hero.headline: Aden Water Sector Plan
hero.subtitle: Transitioning Aden's water and sanitation sector from emergency response to a stable, resilient, and locally governed system.

phases.sectionSub: 12 sequenced phases from framework adoption to public endorsement — July 2025 to January 2029.

mwe.description: MWE is the principal custodian of the Aden Water Sector Plan, providing strategic direction, institutional leadership, and coordination with national frameworks and development partners.

lwsca.description: LWSCA is the primary operational authority for water and sanitation services in Aden, contributing field expertise, infrastructure data, and technical input to the AWSP planning process.

taskforce.description: The AWSP Taskforce is a joint body drawn from MWE and LWSCA, responsible for coordinating programme activities, validating technical outputs, and managing stakeholder engagement across all planning phases.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.body: 193 infrastructure projects delivered across Aden's eight urban districts. Browse by location, intervention type, donor, or sector.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Products
knowledge.body: Diagnostic studies, planning frameworks, technical guidelines, and data resources supporting the AWSP planning process.

news.title: News & Events
news.body: Latest programme updates, phase milestones, stakeholder events, and media resources from the AWSP Taskforce.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Ministry of Water and Environment, Republic of Yemen. All rights reserved.
